title: EarthLand: Season 15
description: The official modpack for EarthLand: Season 15. It features magic, dragons, beasts, and more!
body:
This modpack is a collection of mods designed for a private SMP, but still makes for a fun singleplayer adventure.

---
- Take control of the beautiful creatures of the world with [Ice and Fire](https://modrinth.com/mod/ice-and-fire-dragons), [Star Worm Equestrian](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/swem), and [Mythic Mounts](https://modrinth.com/mod/mythic-mounts)! 🐉🏇
- Master the mystical arts with [Ars Nouveau](https://modrinth.com/mod/ars-nouveau), [Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks](https://modrinth.com/mod/irons-spells-n-spellbooks), and their many addons! 🪄✨
- Become a culinary king with a plethora of food and drink mods, such as the [Let's Do](https://modrinth.com/mod/do-api) and [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) series! 🥘🍴
- Become the ultimate adventurer with [Artifacts](https://modrinth.com/mod/artifacts) and [Relics](https://modrinth.com/mod/relics-mod)! 🗡️💎
- Watch the years pass by with [Serene Seasons](https://modrinth.com/mod/serene-seasons)! 🍂❄️
- Create your own unique toolset with [Tinkers' Construct](https://modrinth.com/mod/tinkers-construct)! 🔨⚙️
- Grow from a town to a kingdom with [MCA Reborn](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-comes-alive-reborn) and [MineColonies](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/minecolonies)! ❤️🏰
- Look farther than ever before thanks to [Bobby Reforged!](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/bobby-reforged)
- ...and much, _much_ more!

---
As stated before, this modpack is designed to be played with many players. While it is fully enjoyable in singleplayer, there's lots of great qualities better with friends!
- Blast your favorite tunes, or compose your own with [Immersive Melodies](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-melodies)! 🎹🎶
- Immerse yourself with [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat)!🎤📻
- Dress in your Sunday best with [Cosmetic Armor Reworked](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cosmetic-armor-reworked), [CosmeticArmours](https://modrinth.com/mod/cosmeticarmours), [Cake's Cosmetics](https://modrinth.com/mod/cakes-cosmetics), [Simple Hats](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-hats) and more! 👚👗
- ...and much, _much_ more!
